description: A care manager needs to add a new home health nurse to a patient's official care team.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Open the patient's record and navigate to the care team section.

expected_outcome.value: Care manager finds the list of current care team members.

nodes.task_description: Search for the home health nurse in the provider directory.

expected_outcome.value: The nurse's provider record is found.

nodes.task_description: Add the nurse to the care team with the role of 'Home Health Nurse'.

expected_outcome.value: The care team is updated, ensuring all members have access to the shared care plan and can communicate securely.
